import { describe, it, expect } from '@jest/globals'
import { createMockInstance } from '../helpers/mock-instance.js'
import { GetActionsUserChat, ActionIdUserChat } from '../../src/actions/action-user-chat.js'

describe('GetActionsUserChat', () => {
	// ── sendAChatViaDM ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
	describe('sendAChatViaDM', () => {
		describe('with userName override', () => {
			it('sends /zoom/userName/chat with message arg', async () => {
				const instance = createMockInstance()
				const actions = GetActionsUserChat(instance)
				await (actions[ActionIdUserChat.sendAChatViaDM] as any).callback(
					{ options: { userName: 'John Smith', message: 'Hello World' } } as any,
					{} as any,
				)
				expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/userName/chat', [
					{ type: 's', value: 'John Smith' },
					{ type: 's', value: 'Hello World' },
				])
			})
		})

		describe('with single selected caller', () => {
			it('sends /zoom/zoomID/chat with message arg', async () => {
				const instance = createMockInstance({ selectedCallers: [1001] })
				const actions = GetActionsUserChat(instance)
				await (actions[ActionIdUserChat.sendAChatViaDM] as any).callback(
					{ options: { userName: '', message: 'Hello World' } } as any,
					{} as any,
				)
				expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/zoomID/chat', [
					{ type: 'i', value: 1001 },
					{ type: 's', value: 'Hello World' },
				])
			})
		})

		describe('with multiple selected callers', () => {
			it('sends /zoom/users/zoomID/chat with message arg', async () => {
				const instance = createMockInstance({ selectedCallers: [1001, 1002] })
				const actions = GetActionsUserChat(instance)
				await (actions[ActionIdUserChat.sendAChatViaDM] as any).callback(
					{ options: { userName: '', message: 'Broadcast message' } } as any,
					{} as any,
				)
				expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/users/zoomID/chat', [
					{ type: 'i', value: 1001 },
					{ type: 'i', value: 1002 },
					{ type: 's', value: 'Broadcast message' },
				])
			})
		})

		describe('message with escaped newlines', () => {
			it('converts \\n escape sequences to real newlines', async () => {
				const instance = createMockInstance({ selectedCallers: [1001] })
				const actions = GetActionsUserChat(instance)
				await (actions[ActionIdUserChat.sendAChatViaDM] as any).callback(
					{ options: { userName: '', message: 'Line 1\\nLine 2' } } as any,
					{} as any,
				)
				expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/zoomID/chat', [
					{ type: 'i', value: 1001 },
					{ type: 's', value: 'Line 1\nLine 2' },
				])
			})
		})
	})
})
---
import { describe, it, expect } from '@jest/globals'
import { createMockInstance } from '../helpers/mock-instance.js'
import { GetActionsUserHandRaised, ActionIdUserHandRaised } from '../../src/actions/action-user-hand-raised.js'

describe('GetActionsUserHandRaised', () => {
	describe('raiseHand (select.multi)', () => {
		it('sends /zoom/userName/raiseHand with string arg when userName is provided', async () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance()
			const actions = GetActionsUserHandRaised(instance)
			await (actions[ActionIdUserHandRaised.raiseHand] as any).callback(
				{ options: { userName: 'Alice' } } as any,
				{} as any,
			)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/userName/raiseHand', [{ type: 's', value: 'Alice' }])
		})

		it('sends /zoom/zoomID/raiseHand with zoomId when single caller selected', async () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance({ selectedCallers: [1001] })
			const actions = GetActionsUserHandRaised(instance)
			await (actions[ActionIdUserHandRaised.raiseHand] as any).callback({ options: { userName: '' } } as any, {} as any)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/zoomID/raiseHand', [{ type: 'i', value: 1001 }])
		})

		it('sends /zoom/users/zoomID/raiseHand with multiple callers', async () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance({ selectedCallers: [1001, 1002] })
			const actions = GetActionsUserHandRaised(instance)
			await (actions[ActionIdUserHandRaised.raiseHand] as any).callback({ options: { userName: '' } } as any, {} as any)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/users/zoomID/raiseHand', [
				{ type: 'i', value: 1001 },
				{ type: 'i', value: 1002 },
			])
		})
	})

	describe('lowerHand (select.multi)', () => {
		it('sends /zoom/userName/lowerHand with string arg when userName is provided', async () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance()
			const actions = GetActionsUserHandRaised(instance)
			await (actions[ActionIdUserHandRaised.lowerHand] as any).callback(
				{ options: { userName: 'Bob' } } as any,
				{} as any,
			)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/userName/lowerHand', [{ type: 's', value: 'Bob' }])
		})

		it('sends /zoom/zoomID/lowerHand with zoomId when single caller selected', async () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance({ selectedCallers: [2001] })
			const actions = GetActionsUserHandRaised(instance)
			await (actions[ActionIdUserHandRaised.lowerHand] as any).callback({ options: { userName: '' } } as any, {} as any)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/zoomID/lowerHand', [{ type: 'i', value: 2001 }])
		})
	})

	describe('toggleHand (select.multi)', () => {
		it('sends /zoom/userName/toggleHand with string arg when userName is provided', async () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance()
			const actions = GetActionsUserHandRaised(instance)
			await (actions[ActionIdUserHandRaised.toggleHand] as any).callback(
				{ options: { userName: 'Carol' } } as any,
				{} as any,
			)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/userName/toggleHand', [
				{ type: 's', value: 'Carol' },
			])
		})

		it('sends /zoom/zoomID/toggleHand with zoomId when single caller selected', async () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance({ selectedCallers: [3001] })
			const actions = GetActionsUserHandRaised(instance)
			await (actions[ActionIdUserHandRaised.toggleHand] as any).callback(
				{ options: { userName: '' } } as any,
				{} as any,
			)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/zoomID/toggleHand', [{ type: 'i', value: 3001 }])
		})
	})

	it('does not send a command when no userName and no selected callers', async () => {
		const instance = createMockInstance()
		const actions = GetActionsUserHandRaised(instance)
		await (actions[ActionIdUserHandRaised.raiseHand] as any).callback({ options: { userName: '' } } as any, {} as any)
		expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).not.toHaveBeenCalled()
	})
})

			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/userName/pin', [{ type: 's', value: 'Alice' }])

import { describe, it, expect } from '@jest/globals'
import { createMockInstance } from '../helpers/mock-instance.js'
import { GetActionsUserRolesAndAction, ActionIdUserRolesAndAction } from '../../src/actions/action-user-roles-action.js'

describe('GetActionsUserRolesAndAction', () => {
	// ── makeHost ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
	describe('makeHost', () => {
		it('sends /zoom/userName/makeHost with string arg when userName is provided', async () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance()
			const actions = GetActionsUserRolesAndAction(instance)
			await (actions[ActionIdUserRolesAndAction.makeHost] as any).callback(
				{ options: { userName: 'Alice' } } as any,
				{} as any,
			)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/userName/makeHost', [{ type: 's', value: 'Alice' }])
		})

		it('sends /zoom/zoomID/makeHost with int arg for single selected caller', async () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance({ selectedCallers: [1001] })
			const actions = GetActionsUserRolesAndAction(instance)
			await (actions[ActionIdUserRolesAndAction.makeHost] as any).callback(
				{ options: { userName: '' } } as any,
				{} as any,
			)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/zoomID/makeHost', [{ type: 'i', value: 1001 }])
		})

		it('sends /zoom/users/zoomID/makeHost for multiple selected callers', async () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance({ selectedCallers: [1001, 1002] })
			const actions = GetActionsUserRolesAndAction(instance)
			await (actions[ActionIdUserRolesAndAction.makeHost] as any).callback(
				{ options: { userName: '' } } as any,
				{} as any,
			)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/users/zoomID/makeHost', [
				{ type: 'i', value: 1001 },
				{ type: 'i', value: 1002 },
			])
		})
	})

	// ── makeCoHost ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
	describe('makeCoHost', () => {
		it('sends /zoom/userName/makeCoHost with string arg when userName is provided', async () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance()
			const actions = GetActionsUserRolesAndAction(instance)
			await (actions[ActionIdUserRolesAndAction.makeCoHost] as any).callback(
				{ options: { userName: 'Bob' } } as any,
				{} as any,
			)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/userName/makeCoHost', [{ type: 's', value: 'Bob' }])
		})

		it('sends /zoom/zoomID/makeCoHost with int arg for single selected caller', async () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance({ selectedCallers: [2002] })
			const actions = GetActionsUserRolesAndAction(instance)
			await (actions[ActionIdUserRolesAndAction.makeCoHost] as any).callback(
				{ options: { userName: '' } } as any,
				{} as any,
			)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/zoomID/makeCoHost', [{ type: 'i', value: 2002 }])
		})
	})

	// ── reclaimHost ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
	describe('reclaimHost', () => {
		it('sends /zoom/reclaimHost with no args (global command)', () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance()
			const actions = GetActionsUserRolesAndAction(instance)
			;(actions[ActionIdUserRolesAndAction.reclaimHost] as any).callback({} as any, {} as any)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/reclaimHost', [])
		})
	})

	// ── revokeCoHost ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
	describe('revokeCoHost', () => {
		it('sends /zoom/userName/revokeCoHost when userName is provided', async () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance()
			const actions = GetActionsUserRolesAndAction(instance)
			await (actions[ActionIdUserRolesAndAction.revokeCoHost] as any).callback(
				{ options: { userName: 'Carol' } } as any,
				{} as any,
			)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/userName/revokeCoHost', [
				{ type: 's', value: 'Carol' },
			])
		})

		it('sends /zoom/zoomID/revokeCoHost for each selected caller when userName is empty', async () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance({ selectedCallers: [3003] })
			const actions = GetActionsUserRolesAndAction(instance)
			await (actions[ActionIdUserRolesAndAction.revokeCoHost] as any).callback(
				{ options: { userName: '' } } as any,
				{} as any,
			)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/zoomID/revokeCoHost', [{ type: 'i', value: 3003 }])
		})
	})

	// ── makePanelist ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
	describe('makePanelist', () => {
		it('sends /zoom/userName/makePanelist with string arg when userName is provided', async () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance()
			const actions = GetActionsUserRolesAndAction(instance)
			await (actions[ActionIdUserRolesAndAction.makePanelist] as any).callback(
				{ options: { userName: 'Dave' } } as any,
				{} as any,
			)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/userName/makePanelist', [
				{ type: 's', value: 'Dave' },
			])
		})

		it('sends /zoom/zoomID/makePanelist for single selected caller', async () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance({ selectedCallers: [4004] })
			const actions = GetActionsUserRolesAndAction(instance)
			await (actions[ActionIdUserRolesAndAction.makePanelist] as any).callback(
				{ options: { userName: '' } } as any,
				{} as any,
			)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/zoomID/makePanelist', [{ type: 'i', value: 4004 }])
		})
	})

	// ── makeAttendee ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
	describe('makeAttendee', () => {
		it('sends /zoom/userName/makeAttendee with string arg when userName is provided', async () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance()
			const actions = GetActionsUserRolesAndAction(instance)
			await (actions[ActionIdUserRolesAndAction.makeAttendee] as any).callback(

import { describe, it, expect } from '@jest/globals'
import { createMockInstance } from '../helpers/mock-instance.js'
import { GetActionsUserView, ActionIdUserView } from '../../src/actions/action-user-view.js'

describe('GetActionsUserView', () => {
	// All view actions are global (/me/…) and require no user routing.

	describe('setGalleryView', () => {
		it('sends /zoom/me/setGalleryView with no args', () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance()
			const actions = GetActionsUserView(instance)
			;(actions[ActionIdUserView.setGalleryView] as any).callback({} as any, {} as any)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/me/setGalleryView', [])
		})
	})

	describe('setSpeakerView', () => {
		it('sends /zoom/me/setSpeakerView with no args', () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance()
			const actions = GetActionsUserView(instance)
			;(actions[ActionIdUserView.setSpeakerView] as any).callback({} as any, {} as any)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/me/setSpeakerView', [])
		})
	})

	describe('gotoNextGalleryPage', () => {
		it('sends /zoom/me/galleryPageNext and then requests gallery order', () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance()
			const actions = GetActionsUserView(instance)
			;(actions[ActionIdUserView.gotoNextGalleryPage] as any).callback({} as any, {} as any)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenNthCalledWith(1, '/zoom/me/galleryPageNext', [])
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenNthCalledWith(2, '/zoom/getGalleryOrder', [])
		})
	})

	describe('gotoPreviousGalleryPage', () => {
		it('sends /zoom/me/galleryPagePrev and then requests gallery order', () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance()
			const actions = GetActionsUserView(instance)
			;(actions[ActionIdUserView.gotoPreviousGalleryPage] as any).callback({} as any, {} as any)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenNthCalledWith(1, '/zoom/me/galleryPagePrev', [])
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenNthCalledWith(2, '/zoom/getGalleryOrder', [])
		})
	})
})

import { describe, it, expect } from '@jest/globals'
import { createMockInstance } from '../helpers/mock-instance.js'
import { GetActionsUserSpotlight, ActionIdUserSpotlight } from '../../src/actions/action-user-spotlight.js'

describe('GetActionsUserSpotlight', () => {
	describe('spotLight (select.single)', () => {
		it('sends /zoom/userName/spot with string arg when userName is provided', async () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance()
			const actions = GetActionsUserSpotlight(instance)
			await (actions[ActionIdUserSpotlight.spotLight] as any).callback(
				{ options: { userName: 'Alice' } } as any,
				{} as any,
			)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/userName/spot', [{ type: 's', value: 'Alice' }])
		})

		it('sends /zoom/zoomID/spot with first zoomId when single caller selected', async () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance({ selectedCallers: [1001] })
			const actions = GetActionsUserSpotlight(instance)
			await (actions[ActionIdUserSpotlight.spotLight] as any).callback({ options: { userName: '' } } as any, {} as any)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/zoomID/spot', [{ type: 'i', value: 1001 }])
		})

		it('sends /zoom/zoomID/spot using only first caller when multiple are selected', async () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance({ selectedCallers: [1001, 1002] })
			const actions = GetActionsUserSpotlight(instance)
			await (actions[ActionIdUserSpotlight.spotLight] as any).callback({ options: { userName: '' } } as any, {} as any)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/zoomID/spot', [{ type: 'i', value: 1001 }])
		})
	})

	describe('addSpotlight (select.multi)', () => {
		it('sends /zoom/userName/addSpot with string arg when userName is provided', async () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance()
			const actions = GetActionsUserSpotlight(instance)
			await (actions[ActionIdUserSpotlight.addSpotlight] as any).callback(
				{ options: { userName: 'Bob' } } as any,
				{} as any,
			)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/userName/addSpot', [{ type: 's', value: 'Bob' }])
		})

		it('sends /zoom/zoomID/addSpot with zoomId when single caller selected', async () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance({ selectedCallers: [2001] })
			const actions = GetActionsUserSpotlight(instance)
			await (actions[ActionIdUserSpotlight.addSpotlight] as any).callback(
				{ options: { userName: '' } } as any,
				{} as any,
			)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/zoomID/addSpot', [{ type: 'i', value: 2001 }])
		})

		it('sends /zoom/users/zoomID/addSpot with multiple callers', async () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance({ selectedCallers: [2001, 2002] })
			const actions = GetActionsUserSpotlight(instance)
			await (actions[ActionIdUserSpotlight.addSpotlight] as any).callback(
				{ options: { userName: '' } } as any,
				{} as any,
			)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/users/zoomID/addSpot', [
				{ type: 'i', value: 2001 },
				{ type: 'i', value: 2002 },
			])
		})
	})

	describe('unSpotLight (select.multi)', () => {
		it('sends /zoom/userName/unSpot with string arg when userName is provided', async () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance()
			const actions = GetActionsUserSpotlight(instance)
			await (actions[ActionIdUserSpotlight.unSpotLight] as any).callback(
				{ options: { userName: 'Carol' } } as any,
				{} as any,
			)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/userName/unSpot', [{ type: 's', value: 'Carol' }])
		})

		it('sends /zoom/zoomID/unSpot with zoomId when single caller selected', async () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance({ selectedCallers: [3001] })
			const actions = GetActionsUserSpotlight(instance)
			await (actions[ActionIdUserSpotlight.unSpotLight] as any).callback(
				{ options: { userName: '' } } as any,
				{} as any,
			)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/zoomID/unSpot', [{ type: 'i', value: 3001 }])
		})
	})

	describe('toggleSpotlight (select.multi)', () => {
		it('sends /zoom/userName/toggleSpot with string arg when userName is provided', async () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance()
			const actions = GetActionsUserSpotlight(instance)
			await (actions[ActionIdUserSpotlight.toggleSpotlight] as any).callback(
				{ options: { userName: 'Dave' } } as any,
				{} as any,
			)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/userName/toggleSpot', [{ type: 's', value: 'Dave' }])
		})

		it('sends /zoom/zoomID/toggleSpot with zoomId when single caller selected', async () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance({ selectedCallers: [4001] })
			const actions = GetActionsUserSpotlight(instance)
			await (actions[ActionIdUserSpotlight.toggleSpotlight] as any).callback(
				{ options: { userName: '' } } as any,
				{} as any,
			)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/zoomID/toggleSpot', [{ type: 'i', value: 4001 }])
		})
	})

	it('does not send a command when no userName and no selected callers', async () => {
		const instance = createMockInstance()
		const actions = GetActionsUserSpotlight(instance)
		await (actions[ActionIdUserSpotlight.spotLight] as any).callback({ options: { userName: '' } } as any, {} as any)
		expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).not.toHaveBeenCalled()
	})
})

import { describe, it, expect } from '@jest/globals'
import { createMockInstance } from '../helpers/mock-instance.js'
import { GetActionsUserVideoMic, ActionIdUserVideoMic } from '../../src/actions/action-user-video-mic.js'

describe('GetActionsUserVideoMic', () => {
	describe('turnVideoOn', () => {
		it('sends /zoom/userName/videoOn with string arg when userName is provided', async () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance()
			const actions = GetActionsUserVideoMic(instance)
			await (actions[ActionIdUserVideoMic.turnVideoOn] as any).callback(
				{ options: { userName: 'Alice' } } as any,
				{} as any,
			)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/userName/videoOn', [{ type: 's', value: 'Alice' }])
		})

		it('sends /zoom/zoomID/videoOn with zoomId when single caller selected', async () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance({ selectedCallers: [1001] })
			const actions = GetActionsUserVideoMic(instance)
			await (actions[ActionIdUserVideoMic.turnVideoOn] as any).callback({ options: { userName: '' } } as any, {} as any)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/zoomID/videoOn', [{ type: 'i', value: 1001 }])
		})

		it('sends /zoom/users/zoomID/videoOn with multiple callers', async () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance({ selectedCallers: [1001, 1002] })
			const actions = GetActionsUserVideoMic(instance)
			await (actions[ActionIdUserVideoMic.turnVideoOn] as any).callback({ options: { userName: '' } } as any, {} as any)
			expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/users/zoomID/videoOn', [
				{ type: 'i', value: 1001 },
				{ type: 'i', value: 1002 },
			])
		})
	})

	describe('turnVideoOff', () => {
		it('sends /zoom/userName/videoOff with string arg when userName is provided', async () => {
			const instance = createMockInstance()
			const actions = GetActionsUserVideoMic(instance)
			await (actions[ActionIdUserVideoMic.turnVideoOff] as any).callback(

import { createMockInstance } from '../helpers/mock-instance.js'
import { GetActionsUserWaitingRoom, ActionIdUserWaitingRoom } from '../../src/actions/action-user-waiting-room.js'

describe('GetActionsUserWaitingRoom', () => {
	// ── admitSomeoneFromWaitingRoom ───────────────────────────────────────────
	describe('admitSomeoneFromWaitingRoom', () => {
		describe('with userName override', () => {
			it('sends /zoom/userName/admit', async () => {
				const instance = createMockInstance()
				const actions = GetActionsUserWaitingRoom(instance)
				await (actions[ActionIdUserWaitingRoom.admitSomeoneFromWaitingRoom] as any).callback(
					{ options: { userName: 'John Smith' } } as any,
					{} as any,
				)
				expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/userName/admit', [
					{ type: 's', value: 'John Smith' },
				])
			})
		})

		describe('with single selected caller', () => {
			it('sends /zoom/zoomID/admit', async () => {
				const instance = createMockInstance({ selectedCallers: [1001] })
				const actions = GetActionsUserWaitingRoom(instance)
				await (actions[ActionIdUserWaitingRoom.admitSomeoneFromWaitingRoom] as any).callback(
					{ options: { userName: '' } } as any,
					{} as any,
				)
				expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/zoomID/admit', [{ type: 'i', value: 1001 }])
			})
		})

		describe('with multiple selected callers', () => {
			it('sends /zoom/users/zoomID/admit', async () => {
				const instance = createMockInstance({ selectedCallers: [1001, 1002] })
				const actions = GetActionsUserWaitingRoom(instance)
				await (actions[ActionIdUserWaitingRoom.admitSomeoneFromWaitingRoom] as any).callback(
					{ options: { userName: '' } } as any,
					{} as any,
				)
				expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/users/zoomID/admit', [
					{ type: 'i', value: 1001 },
					{ type: 'i', value: 1002 },
				])
			})
		})

	// ── sendSomeoneToWaitingRoom ──────────────────────────────────────────────

					{} as any,

					{ type: 's', value: 'Jane Doe' },
				])
			})
		})

		describe('with single selected caller', () => {
			it('sends /zoom/zoomID/sendToWaitingRoom', async () => {
				const instance = createMockInstance({ selectedCallers: [2002] })
				const actions = GetActionsUserWaitingRoom(instance)
				await (actions[ActionIdUserWaitingRoom.sendSomeoneToWaitingRoom] as any).callback(

					{} as any,
				)
				expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/zoomID/sendToWaitingRoom', [
					{ type: 'i', value: 2002 },
				])
			})
		})

		describe('with multiple selected callers', () => {
			it('sends /zoom/users/zoomID/sendToWaitingRoom', async () => {
				const instance = createMockInstance({ selectedCallers: [2002, 2003] })
				const actions = GetActionsUserWaitingRoom(instance)

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Transform test files to hoist GetActionsXxx calls to beforeAll."""
import re
import os

TESTS_DIR = "/Users/lynbh/Development/companion-module-dev/companion-module-zoom-osc-iso/tests/actions"

def read(fname):
with open(os.path.join(TESTS_DIR, fname)) as f:
return f.read()

def write(fname, content):
with open(os.path.join(TESTS_DIR, fname), 'w') as f:
f.write(content)

def add_beforeall_to_import(content):
"""Add beforeAll to the @jest/globals import if not present."""
if 'beforeAll' not in content:
content = re.sub(
r"import \{ (describe, it, expect(?:, jest)?(?:, beforeEach)?(?:, afterEach)?) \} from '@jest/globals'",
lambda m: "import { " + ", ".join(sorted(set(m.group(1).split(', ') + ['beforeAll']), key=lambda x: ['describe','it','expect','jest','beforeAll','beforeEach','afterEach'].index(x) if x in ['describe','it','expect','jest','beforeAll','beforeEach','afterEach'] else 99)) + " } from '@jest/globals'",
content
)
return content

def add_aftereach_to_import(content):
"""Add afterEach to the @jest/globals import if not present."""
if 'afterEach' not in content:
content = re.sub(
r"import \{ (describe, it, expect(?:, jest)?(?:, beforeAll)?(?:, beforeEach)?) \} from '@jest/globals'",
lambda m: "import { " + ", ".join(sorted(set(m.group(1).split(', ') + ['afterEach']), key=lambda x: ['describe','it','expect','jest','beforeAll','beforeEach','afterEach'].index(x) if x in ['describe','it','expect','jest','beforeAll','beforeEach','afterEach'] else 99)) + " } from '@jest/globals'",
content
)
return content

print("Script loaded OK")

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Transform test files to hoist GetActionsXxx calls to beforeAll."""
import os, re

TESTS_DIR = "/Users/lynbh/Development/companion-module-dev/companion-module-zoom-osc-iso/tests/actions"

def w(fname, content):
with open(os.path.join(TESTS_DIR, fname), 'w') as f:
f.write(content)

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# GROUP 1: beforeEach has createMockInstance + mockClear (Rule 6)

# → split to beforeAll (instance+actions) + beforeEach (only mockClear)

# Files: action-global-breakout-rooms, action-global-gallery-tracking,

# action-global-memory-management, action-global-recording,

# action-global-waitingrooms-and-zak, action-global

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def transform_group1(fname, get_fn, action_id_type, import_path):
"""Transform a Group 1 file."""
with open(os.path.join(TESTS_DIR, fname)) as f:
content = f.read()

    # Add beforeAll to import
    content = re.sub(
        r"import \{ describe, it, expect, beforeEach \} from '@jest/globals'",
        "import { describe, it, expect, beforeAll, beforeEach } from '@jest/globals'",
        content
    )

    # Add `let actions` declaration after `let instance`
    content = re.sub(
        r'(\tlet instance: ReturnType<typeof createMockInstance>\n)',
        r'\1\tlet actions: ReturnType<typeof ' + get_fn + r'>\n',
        content
    )

    # Replace beforeEach (has both createMockInstance and mockClear) with:
    # beforeAll (instance + actions) + beforeEach (only mockClear)
    content = re.sub(
        r'\tbeforeEach\(\(\) => \{\n\t\tinstance = createMockInstance\(\)\n\t\t;\(instance\.OSC\.sendCommand as any\)\.mockClear\(\)\n\t\}\)',
        '\tbeforeAll(() => {\n\t\tinstance = createMockInstance()\n\t\tactions = ' + get_fn + r'(instance)' + '\n\t})\n\n\tbeforeEach(() => {\n\t\t;(instance.OSC.sendCommand as jest.Mock).mockClear()\n\t})',
        content
    )

    # Remove `const actions = GetActionsXxx(instance)` from each test
    content = re.sub(
        r'\t\tconst actions = ' + get_fn + r'\(instance\)\n',
        '',
        content
    )

    w(fname, content)
    print(f"Transformed {fname}")

transform_group1(
'action-global-breakout-rooms.test.ts',
'GetActionsGlobalBreakoutRooms',
'ActionIdGlobalBreakoutRooms',
'action-global-breakout-rooms'
)
transform_group1(
'action-global-gallery-tracking-and-data-request.test.ts',
'GetActionsGlobalGalleryTrackingAndDataRequest',
'ActionIdGlobalGalleryTrackingAndDataRequest',
'action-global-gallery-tracking-and-data-request'
)
transform_group1(
'action-global-memory-management.test.ts',
'GetActionsGlobalMemoryManagement',
'ActionIdGlobalMemoryManagement',
'action-global-memory-management'
)
transform_group1(
'action-global-recording.test.ts',
'GetActionsGlobalRecording',
'ActionIdGlobalRecording',
'action-global-recording'
)
transform_group1(
'action-global-waitingrooms-and-zak.test.ts',
'GetActionsGlobalWaitingRoomsAndZak',
'ActionIdGlobalWaitingRoomsAndZak',
'action-global-waitingrooms-and-zak'
)
transform_group1(
'action-global.test.ts',
'GetActionsGlobal',
'ActionIdGlobal',
'action-global'
)

print("Group 1 done.")

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Transform Group 2: beforeEach with only createMockInstance (no mockClear)."""
import os, re

TESTS_DIR = "/Users/lynbh/Development/companion-module-dev/companion-module-zoom-osc-iso/tests/actions"

def r(fname):
with open(os.path.join(TESTS_DIR, fname)) as f: return f.read()
def w(fname, content):
with open(os.path.join(TESTS_DIR, fname), 'w') as f: f.write(content)

# ── action-zoomiso-actions.test.ts ──────────────────────────────────────────

content = r('action-zoomiso-actions.test.ts')

# Add beforeAll, afterEach to import; remove beforeEach

content = content.replace(
"import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach } from '@jest/globals'",
"import { describe, it, expect, beforeAll, afterEach } from '@jest/globals'"
)

# Add let actions after let instance

content = re.sub(
r'(\tlet instance: InstanceBaseExt<ZoomConfig>\n)',
r'\1\tlet actions: ReturnType<typeof GetActionsZoomISOActions>\n',
content
)

# Replace beforeEach with beforeAll + afterEach

content = content.replace(
'\tbeforeEach(() => {\n\t\tinstance = createMockInstance()\n\t})',
'\tbeforeAll(() => {\n\t\tinstance = createMockInstance()\n\t\tactions = GetActionsZoomISOActions(instance)\n\t})\n\n\tafterEach(() => {\n\t\t;(instance.OSC.sendCommand as jest.Mock).mockClear()\n\t})'
)

# Remove const actions = ... from tests

content = re.sub(r'\t\tconst actions = GetActionsZoomISOActions\(instance\)\n', '', content)
w('action-zoomiso-actions.test.ts', content)
print("Done action-zoomiso-actions")

# ── action-zoomiso-output-settings.test.ts ───────────────────────────────────

content = r('action-zoomiso-output-settings.test.ts')
content = content.replace(
"import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach } from '@jest/globals'",
"import { describe, it, expect, beforeAll, afterEach } from '@jest/globals'"
)
content = re.sub(
r'(\tlet instance: InstanceBaseExt<ZoomConfig>\n)',
r'\1\tlet actions: ReturnType<typeof GetActionsZoomISOOutputSettings>\n',
content
)
content = content.replace(
'\tbeforeEach(() => {\n\t\tinstance = createMockInstance()\n\t})',
'\tbeforeAll(() => {\n\t\tinstance = createMockInstance()\n\t\tactions = GetActionsZoomISOOutputSettings(instance)\n\t})\n\n\tafterEach(() => {\n\t\t;(instance.OSC.sendCommand as jest.Mock).mockClear()\n\t})'
)
content = re.sub(r'\t\tconst actions = GetActionsZoomISOOutputSettings\(instance\)\n', '', content)
w('action-zoomiso-output-settings.test.ts', content)
print("Done action-zoomiso-output-settings")

# ── action-zoomiso-engine.test.ts ─────────────────────────────────────────────

content = r('action-zoomiso-engine.test.ts')
content = content.replace(
"import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach } from '@jest/globals'",
"import { describe, it, expect, beforeAll, afterEach } from '@jest/globals'"
)
content = re.sub(
r'(\tlet instance: InstanceBaseExt<ZoomConfig>\n)',
r'\1\tlet actions: ReturnType<typeof GetActionsZoomISOEngine>\n',
content
)
content = content.replace(
'\tbeforeEach(() => {\n\t\tinstance = createMockInstance()\n\t})',
'\tbeforeAll(() => {\n\t\tinstance = createMockInstance()\n\t\tactions = GetActionsZoomISOEngine(instance)\n\t})\n\n\tafterEach(() => {\n\t\t;(instance.OSC.sendCommand as jest.Mock).mockClear()\n\t})'
)

# Remove local actions from tests 1-4 but NOT from test 5 (which overrides instance)

# Test 5 pattern: instance = createMockInstance({ selectedCallers: [1001] })

# We should keep const actions for test 5

# Remove only the standalone `const actions = GetActionsZoomISOEngine(instance)` that appear WITHOUT a preceding instance override

lines = content.split('\n')
new_lines = []
i = 0
while i < len(lines):
line = lines[i] # If this line is `		const actions = GetActionsZoomISOEngine(instance)`, # check if the PREVIOUS non-empty line is `instance = createMockInstance(...)` (an override)
if line.strip() == 'const actions = GetActionsZoomISOEngine(instance)': # Look back for the previous substantive line
j = i - 1
while j >= 0 and lines[j].strip() == '': j -= 1
prev = lines[j].strip() if j >= 0 else ''
if 'createMockInstance' in prev and 'selectedCallers' in prev: # This is the test 5 case - keep the actions line
new_lines.append(line)
else: # Remove it
pass
else:
new_lines.append(line)
i += 1
content = '\n'.join(new_lines)
w('action-zoomiso-engine.test.ts', content)

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Transform Group 3: complex beforeEach files."""
import os, re

TESTS_DIR = "/Users/lynbh/Development/companion-module-dev/companion-module-zoom-osc-iso/tests/actions"

def r(fname):
with open(os.path.join(TESTS_DIR, fname)) as f: return f.read()

# Add beforeAll, afterEach to import

content = content.replace(
"import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach } from '@jest/globals'",
"import { describe, it, expect, beforeAll, beforeEach, afterEach } from '@jest/globals'"
)

# Add let actions after let instance

content = re.sub(
r'(\tlet instance: InstanceBaseExt<ZoomConfig>\n)',
r'\1\tlet actions: ReturnType<typeof GetActionsGroups>\n',
content
)

# Replace beforeEach: move instance creation to beforeAll, keep data setup in beforeEach

OLD = """\tbeforeEach(() => {
\t\tinstance = createMockInstance({ selectedCallers: [1001] })
\t\t// Index 0 = All, 1 = Host/Me, 2+ = user-defined groups
\t\tinstance.ZoomGroupData = [
\t\t\t{ groupName: 'All', users: [] },
\t\t\t{ groupName: 'Host', users: [] },
\t\t\t{ groupName: 'Group A', users: [] },
\t\t\t{ groupName: 'Group B', users: [] },
\t\t\t{ groupName: 'Group C', users: [] },
\t\t]
\t\tinstance.ZoomUserData = {
\t\t\t1001: { zoomId: 1001, userName: 'Alice', videoOn: true },
\t\t\t1002: { zoomId: 1002, userName: 'Bob', videoOn: false },
\t\t} as any
\t})"""
NEW = """\tbeforeAll(() => {
\t\tinstance = createMockInstance({ selectedCallers: [1001] })
\t\tactions = GetActionsGroups(instance)
\t})

\tbeforeEach(() => {
\t\t// Index 0 = All, 1 = Host/Me, 2+ = user-defined groups
\t\tinstance.ZoomGroupData = [
\t\t\t{ groupName: 'All', users: [] },
\t\t\t{ groupName: 'Host', users: [] },
\t\t\t{ groupName: 'Group A', users: [] },
\t\t\t{ groupName: 'Group B', users: [] },
\t\t\t{ groupName: 'Group C', users: [] },
\t\t]
\t\tinstance.ZoomUserData = {
\t\t\t1001: { zoomId: 1001, userName: 'Alice', videoOn: true },
\t\t\t1002: { zoomId: 1002, userName: 'Bob', videoOn: false },
\t\t} as any
\t})

\tafterEach(() => {
\t\t;(instance.OSC.sendCommand as jest.Mock).mockClear()
\t})"""
content = content.replace(OLD, NEW)

# Remove local const actions from each test

content = re.sub(r'\t\tconst actions = GetActionsGroups\(instance\)\n', '', content)
w('action-group.test.ts', content)
print("Done action-group")

# ── action-performance-tweaks.test.ts ─────────────────────────────────────────

content = r('action-performance-tweaks.test.ts')
content = content.replace(
"import { describe, it, expect, jest, beforeEach } from '@jest/globals'",
"import { describe, it, expect, jest, beforeAll, beforeEach, afterEach } from '@jest/globals'"
)
content = re.sub(
r'(\tlet instance: InstanceBaseExt<ZoomConfig>\n)',
r'\1\tlet actions: ReturnType<typeof GetActionsPerformanceTweaks>\n',
content
)
OLD = """\tbeforeEach(() => {
\t\tinstance = createMockInstance()
\t\t;(instance as any).saveConfig = jest.fn()
\t})"""
NEW = """\tbeforeAll(() => {
\t\tinstance = createMockInstance()
\t\tactions = GetActionsPerformanceTweaks(instance)
\t})

\tbeforeEach(() => {
\t\t;(instance as any).saveConfig = jest.fn()
\t})

\tafterEach(() => {
\t\t;(instance.OSC.sendCommand as jest.Mock).mockClear()
\t})"""
content = content.replace(OLD, NEW)
content = re.sub(r'\t\t\tconst actions = GetActionsPerformanceTweaks\(instance\)\n', '', content)
w('action-performance-tweaks.test.ts', content)
print("Done action-performance-tweaks")

# ── action-social-stream.test.ts ───────────────────────────────────────────────

content = r('action-social-stream.test.ts')
content = content.replace(
"import { describe, it, expect, jest, beforeEach } from '@jest/globals'",
"import { describe, it, expect, jest, beforeAll, beforeEach, afterEach } from '@jest/globals'"
)
content = re.sub(
r'(\tlet instance: InstanceBaseExt<ZoomConfig>\n)',
r'\1\tlet actions: ReturnType<typeof GetActionsSocalSteam>\n',
content
)
OLD = """\tbeforeEach(() => {
\t\tinstance = createMockInstance()
\t\t;(instance as any).saveConfig = jest.fn()
\t\tpostMessageSpy = jest.spyOn(socialStreamApi, 'postMessage').mockResolvedValue(undefined as never)
\t\tjest.clearAllMocks()
\t\t// Re-spy after clearAllMocks since clearAllMocks resets mock state
\t\tpostMessageSpy = jest.spyOn(socialStreamApi, 'postMessage').mockResolvedValue(undefined as never)
\t})"""
NEW = """\tbeforeAll(() => {
\t\tinstance = createMockInstance()
\t\tactions = GetActionsSocalSteam(instance)
\t})

\tbeforeEach(() => {
\t\t;(instance as any).saveConfig = jest.fn()
\t\tpostMessageSpy = jest.spyOn(socialStreamApi, 'postMessage').mockResolvedValue(undefined as never)
\t\tjest.clearAllMocks()
\t\t// Re-spy after clearAllMocks since clearAllMocks resets mock state
\t\tpostMessageSpy = jest.spyOn(socialStreamApi, 'postMessage').mockResolvedValue(undefined as never)
\t})

\tafterEach(() => {
\t\t;(instance.OSC.sendCommand as jest.Mock).mockClear()
\t})"""
content = content.replace(OLD, NEW)
content = re.sub(r'\t\t\tconst actions = GetActionsSocalSteam\(instance\)\n', '', content)
w('action-social-stream.test.ts', content)
print("Done action-social-stream")

# ── action-zoomiso-routing.test.ts ─────────────────────────────────────────────

# Keep beforeEach for instance creation, add GetActions to beforeEach.

# Tests that override instance keep local const actions; others remove it.

content = r('action-zoomiso-routing.test.ts')
content = content.replace(
"import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach } from '@jest/globals'",
"import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach, afterEach } from '@jest/globals'"
)
content = re.sub(
r'(\tlet instance: InstanceBaseExt<ZoomConfig>\n)',
r'\1\tlet actions: ReturnType<typeof GetActionsZoomISORouting>\n',
content
)

# Extend beforeEach to also create actions

content = content.replace(
'\tbeforeEach(() => {\n\t\tinstance = createMockInstance()\n\t})',
'\tbeforeEach(() => {\n\t\tinstance = createMockInstance()\n\t\tactions = GetActionsZoomISORouting(instance)\n\t})\n\n\tafterEach(() => {\n\t\t;(instance.OSC.sendCommand as jest.Mock).mockClear()\n\t})'
)

# Remove `const actions = GetActionsZoomISORouting(instance)` from tests that DON'T override instance

# (those that DO override instance keep local `const actions`)

lines = content.split('\n')
new_lines = []
i = 0
while i < len(lines):
line = lines[i]
if line.strip() == 'const actions = GetActionsZoomISORouting(instance)': # Look back for instance override
j = i - 1
while j >= 0 and lines[j].strip() == '': j -= 1
prev = lines[j].strip() if j >= 0 else ''
if 'createMockInstance' in prev:
new_lines.append(line) # keep: test creates own instance # else: remove (uses outer actions from beforeEach)
else:
new_lines.append(line)
i += 1
content = '\n'.join(new_lines)
w('action-zoomiso-routing.test.ts', content)
print("Done action-zoomiso-routing")

print("Group 3 done.")

"""Transform edge cases: action-gallery, action-user, action-zoomiso-actions (already done)."""
import os, re

TESTS_DIR = "/Users/lynbh/Development/companion-module-dev/companion-module-zoom-osc-iso/tests/actions"

"import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach } from '@jest/globals'",
"import { describe, it, expect, beforeAll, beforeEach, afterEach } from '@jest/globals'"
)

# Add let actions after let instance

content = re.sub(
r'(\tlet instance: InstanceBaseExt<ZoomConfig>\n)',
r'\1\tlet actions: ReturnType<typeof GetActionsGallery>\n',
content
)

# Replace beforeEach

\t\tinstance = createMockInstance({ selectedCallers: [] })
\t\tinstance.ZoomClientDataObj.galleryOrder = [1001, 1002, 1003]
\t})"""
NEW = """\tbeforeAll(() => {
\t\tinstance = createMockInstance({ selectedCallers: [] })
\t\tactions = GetActionsGallery(instance)
\t})

\tbeforeEach(() => {
\t\tinstance.ZoomClientDataObj.galleryOrder = [1001, 1002, 1003]
\t\tinstance.ZoomClientDataObj.selectedCallers = []
\t})

\tafterEach(() => {
\t\t;(instance.OSC.sendCommand as jest.Mock).mockClear()
\t})"""
content = content.replace(OLD, NEW)

# Remove `const actions = GetActionsGallery(instance)` from tests that use default instance

# (tests 1, 2 which don't override instance before calling actions)

# Keep it for tests 3,4,5 (which override instance) and 6,7 (which need current instance)

# Actually: tests 3,4,5 override instance then create actions; tests 6,7 create actions with current instance

# Let's remove only the ones that don't have an instance override on the preceding line

lines = content.split('\n')
new_lines = []
i = 0
while i < len(lines):
line = lines[i]
if line.strip() == 'const actions = GetActionsGallery(instance)': # Look back for instance override
j = i - 1
while j >= 0 and lines[j].strip() == '': j -= 1
prev = lines[j].strip() if j >= 0 else ''
if 'createMockInstance' in prev or 'galleryOrder' in prev:
new_lines.append(line) # keep
else:
pass # remove (tests 1, 2 use outer actions from beforeAll)
else:
new_lines.append(line)
i += 1
content = '\n'.join(new_lines)
w('action-gallery.test.ts', content)
print("Done action-gallery")

# ── action-user.test.ts ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

content = r('action-user.test.ts')
content = content.replace(
"import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach } from '@jest/globals'",
"import { describe, it, expect, beforeAll, beforeEach, afterEach } from '@jest/globals'"
)

r'(\tlet instance: InstanceBaseExt<ZoomConfig>\n)',
r'\1\tlet actions: ReturnType<typeof GetActionsUsers>\n',
content
)

\t\t} as any

\t\t\t{ zoomId: 1002, userName: 'Bob' },
\t\t\t{ zoomId: 1003, userName: 'Charlie' },
\t\t]
\t})"""

\t})

\tbeforeEach(() => {

Now let me handle the "no beforeEach" files with leaf-describe patterns:

### ✅ `bash`

$ cat > /tmp/transform_leaf.py << 'PYEOF'
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Transform files with leaf-describe pattern (one test per innermost describe)."""
import os, re

TESTS_DIR = "/Users/lynbh/Development/companion-module-dev/companion-module-zoom-osc-iso/tests/actions"

def r(fname):
with open(os.path.join(TESTS_DIR, fname)) as f: return f.read()
def w(fname, content):
with open(os.path.join(TESTS_DIR, fname), 'w') as f: f.write(content)

def transform_leaf_file(fname, get_fn, return_type, instance_variants):
"""
For files where EACH innermost describe has exactly ONE test.
instance_variants: list of (describe_label_pattern, selectedCallers_args)
Add beforeAll+afterEach to each leaf describe, remove inline instance+actions.
"""
content = r(fname)

    # Add beforeAll, afterEach to import
    content = re.sub(
        r"import \{ describe, it, expect \} from '@jest/globals'",
        "import { describe, it, expect, beforeAll, afterEach } from '@jest/globals'",
        content
    )

    # For each leaf describe, we need to:
    # 1. Add `let instance` and `let actions` declarations
    # 2. Add beforeAll with the createMockInstance call
    # 3. Add afterEach with mockClear
    # 4. Remove the inline instance and actions creation from the test

    # We'll do this by finding patterns like:
    # describe('...', () => {
    #     it('...', async () => {  (or sync)
    #         const instance = createMockInstance(...)
    #         const actions = GetActionsXxx(instance)
    #         ... rest of test
    #     })
    # })
    # And transforming them

    # Pattern to match leaf describe with single test
    # This is complex; let's do it line by line
    lines = content.split('\n')
    new_lines = []
    i = 0
    while i < len(lines):
        line = lines[i]

        # Check if this starts a `it('...', async () => {` or `it('...', () => {`
        # that is preceded by a describe block with no other content
        it_match = re.match(r'^(\t+)it\(', line)
        if it_match and i + 2 < len(lines):
            indent = it_match.group(1)
            # Check if the next line is `const instance = createMockInstance(...)`
            next_line = lines[i+1] if i+1 < len(lines) else ''
            inst_match = re.match(r'^' + re.escape(indent) + r'\tconst instance = createMockInstance\((.*)\)', next_line)
            if inst_match:
                inst_args = inst_match.group(1).strip()
                # Check if the line after that is `const actions = GetActionsXxx(instance)`
                next_next_line = lines[i+2] if i+2 < len(lines) else ''
                act_match = re.match(r'^' + re.escape(indent) + r'\tconst actions = ' + re.escape(get_fn) + r'\(instance\)', next_next_line)
                if act_match:
                    # Found the pattern! Now we need to check that this it() is ALONE in its describe
                    # Find the containing describe by looking backwards
                    desc_indent = indent[:-1]  # one level up
                    desc_idx = i - 1
                    while desc_idx >= 0 and lines[desc_idx].strip() == '': desc_idx -= 1

                    if desc_idx >= 0:
                        desc_line = lines[desc_idx]
                        desc_match = re.match(r'^' + re.escape(desc_indent) + r"describe\(", desc_line)

                        if desc_match:
                            # Check if there's only ONE it() in this describe block
                            # Count it() at this indent level between the describe and closing }
                            # For now, assume it's a leaf describe with one test

                            # Insert beforeAll and afterEach after the describe opening
                            # We need to inject BEFORE the `it(` line
                            if inst_args:
                                init_call = f'createMockInstance({inst_args})'
                            else:
                                init_call = 'createMockInstance()'

                            new_lines.append(f'{indent}let instance: ReturnType<typeof createMockInstance>')
                            new_lines.append(f'{indent}let actions: ReturnType<typeof {get_fn}>')
                            new_lines.append('')
                            new_lines.append(f'{indent}beforeAll(() => {{')
                            new_lines.append(f'{indent}\tinstance = {init_call}')
                            new_lines.append(f'{indent}\tactions = {get_fn}(instance)')
                            new_lines.append(f'{indent}}})')
                            new_lines.append('')
                            new_lines.append(f'{indent}afterEach(() => {{')
                            new_lines.append(f'{indent}\t;(instance.OSC.sendCommand as jest.Mock).mockClear()')
                            new_lines.append(f'{indent}}})')
                            new_lines.append('')
                            # Output the it() line (without the instance+actions creation)
                            new_lines.append(line)
                            i += 3  # skip const instance and const actions lines
                            continue

        new_lines.append(line)
        i += 1

    content = '\n'.join(new_lines)
    w(fname, content)
    print(f"Done {fname}")

# Transform leaf files

transform_leaf_file(
'action-user-breakout-rooms.test.ts',
'GetActionsUserBreakoutRooms',
'GetActionsUserBreakoutRooms',
[]
)
transform_leaf_file(
'action-user-chat.test.ts',
'GetActionsUserChat',
'GetActionsUserChat',
[]
)
transform_leaf_file(
'action-user-waiting-room.test.ts',
'GetActionsUserWaitingRoom',
'GetActionsUserWaitingRoom',
[]
)
transform_leaf_file(
'action-user-webinars.test.ts',
'GetActionsUserWebinar',
'GetActionsUserWebinar',
[]
)

print("Leaf files done.")

Now handle the shared-instance pattern files:

### ✅ `bash`

$ cat > /tmp/transform_shared.py << 'PYEOF'
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Transform shared-instance pattern files."""
import os, re

TESTS_DIR = "/Users/lynbh/Development/companion-module-dev/companion-module-zoom-osc-iso/tests/actions"

def r(fname):
with open(os.path.join(TESTS_DIR, fname)) as f: return f.read()
def w(fname, content):
with open(os.path.join(TESTS_DIR, fname), 'w') as f: f.write(content)

def transform_shared_instance(fname, get_fn, outer_describe_name):
"""
For files where inner describes have multiple tests with different selectedCallers.
Use shared outer instance + explicit selectedCallers setup in tests.
afterEach resets selectedCallers to [].
"""
content = r(fname)

    # Add beforeAll, afterEach to import
    content = re.sub(
        r"import \{ describe, it, expect \} from '@jest/globals'",
        "import { describe, it, expect, beforeAll, afterEach } from '@jest/globals'",
        content
    )

    # Find the outer describe opening and add let instance, let actions, beforeAll, afterEach
    # Pattern: describe('OuterName', () => {\n
    outer_pattern = r"(describe\('" + re.escape(outer_describe_name) + r"', \(\) => \{\n)"

    def add_setup(m):
        return (m.group(1) +
                f"\tlet instance: ReturnType<typeof createMockInstance>\n"
                f"\tlet actions: ReturnType<typeof {get_fn}>\n"
                f"\n"
                f"\tbeforeAll(() => {{\n"
                f"\t\tinstance = createMockInstance()\n"
                f"\t\tactions = {get_fn}(instance)\n"
                f"\t}})\n"
                f"\n"
                f"\tafterEach(() => {{\n"
                f"\t\t;(instance.OSC.sendCommand as jest.Mock).mockClear()\n"
                f"\t\tinstance.ZoomClientDataObj.selectedCallers = []\n"
                f"\t}})\n"
                f"\n")

    content = re.sub(outer_pattern, add_setup, content)

    # Now transform each test:
    # 1. Replace `const instance = createMockInstance({ selectedCallers: [...] })` with
    #    `instance.ZoomClientDataObj.selectedCallers = [...]`
    # 2. Remove `const instance = createMockInstance()` (selectedCallers already [])
    # 3. Remove `const actions = GetActionsXxx(instance)`

    lines = content.split('\n')
    new_lines = []
    i = 0
    while i < len(lines):
        line = lines[i]
        stripped = line.strip()

        # Match: const instance = createMockInstance({ selectedCallers: [...] })
        sc_match = re.match(r'^(\t+)const instance = createMockInstance\(\{ selectedCallers: (\[[^\]]*\]).*\}\)', line)
        if sc_match:
            indent = sc_match.group(1)
            callers = sc_match.group(2)
            new_lines.append(f'{indent}instance.ZoomClientDataObj.selectedCallers = {callers}')
            i += 1
            continue

        # Match: const instance = createMockInstance() - with optional selectionMethod
        sc_match2 = re.match(r'^(\t+)const instance = createMockInstance\(\{ selectedCallers: (\[[^\]]*\]), selectionMethod: (\d+) \}\)', line)
        if sc_match2:
            indent = sc_match2.group(1)
            callers = sc_match2.group(2)
            method = sc_match2.group(3)
            new_lines.append(f'{indent}instance.ZoomClientDataObj.selectedCallers = {callers}')
            new_lines.append(f'{indent}instance.config.selectionMethod = {method}')
            i += 1
            continue

        # Match: const instance = createMockInstance() (no args)
        if re.match(r'^\t+const instance = createMockInstance\(\)$', line):
            # Just remove it (afterEach resets selectedCallers to [])
            i += 1
            continue

        # Match: const actions = GetActionsXxx(instance)
        if re.match(r'^\t+const actions = ' + re.escape(get_fn) + r'\(instance\)$', line):
            i += 1
            continue

        new_lines.append(line)
        i += 1

    content = '\n'.join(new_lines)
    w(fname, content)
    print(f"Done {fname}")

transform_shared_instance(
'action-user-hand-raised.test.ts',
'GetActionsUserHandRaised',
'GetActionsUserHandRaised'
)
transform_shared_instance(
'action-user-pin.test.ts',
'GetActionsUserPin',
'GetActionsUserPin'
)
transform_shared_instance(
'action-user-roles-action.test.ts',
'GetActionsUserRolesAndAction',
'GetActionsUserRolesAndAction'
)
transform_shared_instance(
'action-user-spotlight.test.ts',
'GetActionsUserSpotlight',
'GetActionsUserSpotlight'
)
transform_shared_instance(
'action-user-video-mic.test.ts',
'GetActionsUserVideoMic',
'GetActionsUserVideoMic'
)

print("Shared instance files done.")

import { createMockInstance } from '../helpers/mock-instance.js'
import { GetActionsUserSettings, ActionIdUserSettings } from '../../src/actions/action-user-settings.js'

describe('GetActionsUserSettings', () => {
	// ── Global commands (no user routing) ──────────────────────────────────

	describe('hideSelfView', () => {

import { describe, it, expect, beforeAll, afterEach } from '@jest/globals'
import { createMockInstance } from '../helpers/mock-instance.js'
import type { InstanceBaseExt } from '../../src/utils.js'
import type { ZoomConfig } from '../../src/config.js'

// jest.mock is hoisted before imports — feedback-state-machine is also
// stubbed via moduleNameMapper in jest.config.ts, but this mock provides
// specific FeedbackId values needed by action-zoomiso-actions assertions.
jest.mock('../../src/feedback.js', () => ({
	FeedbackId: {
		selectionMethod: 'selection_Method',
		groupBased: 'group_Based',
		groupBasedAdvanced: 'group_Based_Advanced',
		indexBased: 'index_Based',
		indexBasedAdvanced: 'index_Based_Advanced',
		galleryBased: 'gallery_Based',
		galleryBasedAdvanced: 'gallery_Based_Advanced',
		userNameBased: 'user_Name_Based',
		userNameBasedAdvanced: 'user_Name_Based_Advanced',
		output: 'output',
		audioOutput: 'audio_Output',
		engineState: 'engine_State',
		capturePermissionGranted: 'capture_permission_granted',
		isPro: 'is_pro',
	},
}))

import { GetActionsZoomISOActions, ActionIdZoomISOActions } from '../../src/actions/action-zoomiso-actions.js'

describe('GetActionsZoomISOActions', () => {
	let instance: InstanceBaseExt<ZoomConfig>
	let actions: ReturnType<typeof GetActionsZoomISOActions>

	beforeAll(() => {
		instance = createMockInstance()
		actions = GetActionsZoomISOActions(instance)
	})

	afterEach(() => {
		;(instance.OSC.sendCommand as jest.Mock).mockClear()
	})

	describe(ActionIdZoomISOActions.selectOutput, () => {
		it('adds output to selectedOutputs when not present', async () => {
				await (actions[ActionIdZoomISOActions.selectOutput] as any).callback({ options: { output: 3 } } as any, {} as any)
			expect(instance.ZoomClientDataObj.selectedOutputs).toContain(3)
		})

		it('removes output from selectedOutputs when already present', async () => {
			instance.ZoomClientDataObj.selectedOutputs = [3]
				await (actions[ActionIdZoomISOActions.selectOutput] as any).callback({ options: { output: 3 } } as any, {} as any)
			expect(instance.ZoomClientDataObj.selectedOutputs).not.toContain(3)
		})

		it('calls checkFeedbacks', async () => {
				await (actions[ActionIdZoomISOActions.selectOutput] as any).callback({ options: { output: 1 } } as any, {} as any)
			expect(instance.checkFeedbacks).toHaveBeenCalled()
		})
	})

	describe(ActionIdZoomISOActions.clearSelectOutput, () => {
		it('clears selectedOutputs', async () => {
			instance.ZoomClientDataObj.selectedOutputs = [1, 2, 3]
				await (actions[ActionIdZoomISOActions.clearSelectOutput] as any).callback({} as any, {} as any)
			expect(instance.ZoomClientDataObj.selectedOutputs).toEqual([])
		})

		it('calls checkFeedbacks', async () => {
				await (actions[ActionIdZoomISOActions.clearSelectOutput] as any).callback({} as any, {} as any)
			expect(instance.checkFeedbacks).toHaveBeenCalled()
		})
	})

	describe(ActionIdZoomISOActions.selectAudioChannel, () => {
		it('adds audio channel to selectedAudioOutputs when not present', async () => {
				await (actions[ActionIdZoomISOActions.selectAudioChannel] as any).callback(
				{ options: { output: 2 } } as any,
				{} as any,
			)
			expect(instance.ZoomClientDataObj.selectedAudioOutputs).toContain(2)

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Transform remaining files: user-view, user-screenshare, user-settings, action-utils."""
import os, re

TESTS_DIR = "/Users/lynbh/Development/companion-module-dev/companion-module-zoom-osc-iso/tests/actions"

def r(fname):
with open(os.path.join(TESTS_DIR, fname)) as f: return f.read()
def w(fname, content):
with open(os.path.join(TESTS_DIR, fname), 'w') as f: f.write(content)

def add_outer_beforeall(content, get_fn, outer_name):
"""Add beforeAll+afterEach+selectedCallers reset to outer describe, remove inline instance+actions."""
content = re.sub(
r"import \{ describe, it, expect \} from '@jest/globals'",
"import { describe, it, expect, beforeAll, afterEach } from '@jest/globals'",
content
)
outer_pattern = r"(describe\('" + re.escape(outer_name) + r"', \(\) => \{\n)"
def add_setup(m):
return (m.group(1) +
f"\tlet instance: ReturnType<typeof createMockInstance>\n"
f"\tlet actions: ReturnType<typeof {get_fn}>\n"
f"\n"
f"\tbeforeAll(() => {{\n"
                f"\t\tinstance = createMockInstance()\n"
                f"\t\tactions = {get_fn}(instance)\n"
                f"\t}})\n"
f"\n"
f"\tafterEach(() => {{\n"
                f"\t\t;(instance.OSC.sendCommand as jest.Mock).mockClear()\n"
                f"\t\tinstance.ZoomClientDataObj.selectedCallers = []\n"
                f"\t}})\n"
f"\n")
content = re.sub(outer_pattern, add_setup, content)

    # Replace `const instance = createMockInstance({ selectedCallers: [...] })` in tests
    content = re.sub(
        r'^(\t+)const instance = createMockInstance\(\{ selectedCallers: (\[[^\]]*\])[^}]*\}\)',
        lambda m: f'{m.group(1)}instance.ZoomClientDataObj.selectedCallers = {m.group(2)}',
        content, flags=re.MULTILINE
    )
    # Remove `const instance = createMockInstance()` (no args)
    content = re.sub(r'^\t+const instance = createMockInstance\(\)\n', '', content, flags=re.MULTILINE)
    # Remove `const actions = GetActionsXxx(instance)`
    content = re.sub(r'^\t+const actions = ' + re.escape(get_fn) + r'\(instance\)\n', '', content, flags=re.MULTILINE)
    return content

# ── action-user-view.test.ts (all same, leaf describes) ──────────────────────

content = r('action-user-view.test.ts')
content = add_outer_beforeall(content, 'GetActionsUserView', 'GetActionsUserView')
w('action-user-view.test.ts', content)
print("Done action-user-view")

# ── action-user-screenshare.test.ts (mixed: leaf + selectedCallers) ──────────

content = r('action-user-screenshare.test.ts')
content = add_outer_beforeall(content, 'GetActionsUserScreenshare', 'GetActionsUserScreenshare')
w('action-user-screenshare.test.ts', content)
print("Done action-user-screenshare")

# ── action-user-settings.test.ts (mixed: leaf + selectedCallers) ─────────────

content = r('action-user-settings.test.ts')
content = add_outer_beforeall(content, 'GetActionsUserSettings', 'GetActionsUserSettings')
w('action-user-settings.test.ts', content)
print("Done action-user-settings")

# ── action-utils.test.ts ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# createCommand describe: keep beforeEach (tests override instance, no GetActionsXxx)

# sendActionCommand describe: add beforeAll + afterEach, remove inline instance for tests 1,2

content = r('action-utils.test.ts')

# Add afterEach to import

content = content.replace(
"import { describe, it, expect, beforeEach } from '@jest/globals'",
"import { describe, it, expect, beforeAll, beforeEach, afterEach } from '@jest/globals'"
)

# Find sendActionCommand describe and add beforeAll + afterEach

OLD = """// ── sendActionCommand ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
describe('sendActionCommand', () => {
\tit('calls instance.OSC.sendCommand with path and args', () => {
\t\tconst instance = createMockInstance()
\t\tsendActionCommand(instance, {
\t\t\toptions: {
\t\t\t\tcommand: '/zoom/startLocalRecording',
\t\t\t\targs: [],
\t\t\t},
\t\t})
\t\texpect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/startLocalRecording', [])
\t})

\tit('passes args correctly', () => {
\t\tconst instance = createMockInstance()
\t\tconst args = [{ type: 'i', value: 1001 }]
\t\tsendActionCommand(instance, {
\t\t\toptions: { command: '/zoom/zoomID/videoOn', args },
\t\t})
\t\texpect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/zoomID/videoOn', args)
\t})

\tit('does not throw when instance.OSC is null/undefined', () => {
\t\tconst instance = createMockInstance()
\t\t;(instance as any).OSC = null
\t\texpect(() => sendActionCommand(instance, { options: { command: '/zoom/test', args: [] } })).not.toThrow()
\t})
})"""
NEW = """// ── sendActionCommand ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
describe('sendActionCommand', () => {
\tlet instance: ReturnType<typeof createMockInstance>

\tbeforeAll(() => {
\t\tinstance = createMockInstance()
\t})

\tafterEach(() => {
\t\t;(instance.OSC.sendCommand as jest.Mock).mockClear()
\t})

\tit('calls instance.OSC.sendCommand with path and args', () => {
\t\tsendActionCommand(instance, {
\t\t\toptions: {
\t\t\t\tcommand: '/zoom/startLocalRecording',
\t\t\t\targs: [],
\t\t\t},
\t\t})
\t\texpect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/startLocalRecording', [])
\t})

\tit('passes args correctly', () => {
\t\tconst args = [{ type: 'i', value: 1001 }]
\t\tsendActionCommand(instance, {
\t\t\toptions: { command: '/zoom/zoomID/videoOn', args },
\t\t})
\t\texpect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith('/zoom/zoomID/videoOn', args)
\t})

\tit('does not throw when instance.OSC is null/undefined', () => {
\t\tconst instance = createMockInstance()
\t\t;(instance as any).OSC = null
\t\texpect(() => sendActionCommand(instance, { options: { command: '/zoom/test', args: [] } })).not.toThrow()
\t})
})"""
content = content.replace(OLD, NEW)
w('action-utils.test.ts', content)
print("Done action-utils")

print("Remaining files done.")
PYEOF

### 💬 Copilot

`action-zoomiso-routing.test.ts` correctly uses `beforeEach` (not `beforeAll`) since its tests contain inline instance overrides — this follows Rule 7's "hoist it alongside the beforeEach setup" path. All other files use `beforeAll`.

All 318 tests pass across all 28 files. Here's a summary of what was changed:

**Group 1 (6 files)** — `action-global-*.test.ts` and `action-global.test.ts`: Split `beforeEach` (had both `createMockInstance` + `mockClear`) into `beforeAll` (instance + actions) + `beforeEach` (only `mockClear`). Removed `const actions = ...` from each test.

**Group 2 (3 files)** — `action-zoomiso-{actions,engine,output-settings}.test.ts`: Moved `createMockInstance` from `beforeEach` to `beforeAll`, added `GetActions` to `beforeAll`, replaced `beforeEach` with `afterEach` (mockClear). One test in `zoomiso-engine` retains its local instance override.

**Group 3 (4 files)** — `action-group`, `action-performance-tweaks`, `action-social-stream`, `action-zoomiso-routing`: Added `beforeAll` for instance+actions, kept `beforeEach` for state resets (ZoomGroupData, saveConfig mock, spy setup). `action-zoomiso-routing` moved `GetActions` into `beforeEach` instead of `beforeAll` due to inline instance overrides.

**Edge cases (2 files)** — `action-gallery` and `action-user`: Hoisted instance+actions to `beforeAll`, converted `beforeEach` to state-only reset (galleryOrder, ZoomVariableLink, saveConfig), added `afterEach` mockClear.

**Leaf-describe pattern (4 files)** — `action-user-{breakout-rooms,chat,waiting-room,webinars}`: Added `beforeAll`+`afterEach` to each leaf describe (which has exactly one test), removed inline instance+actions.

**Shared-instance pattern (6 files)** — `action-user-{hand-raised,pin,roles-action,spotlight,video-mic,view,screenshare,settings}`: Added outer-level `beforeAll`+`afterEach` (with `selectedCallers = []` reset), replaced inline `createMockInstance({selectedCallers:[...]})` with `instance.ZoomClientDataObj.selectedCallers = [...]` in each test.

**`action-utils.test.ts`**: Added `beforeAll`+`afterEach` to the `sendActionCommand` describe; the `createCommand` describe was already well-structured with `beforeEach` and no `GetActionsXxx` to hoist.

<sub>⏱️ 11301m 55s</sub>

### 👤 User

for prettier, what are some of the lines starting with a ; in order to pass the prettier rules?

---

<sub>⏱️ 11302m 15s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

In **no-semicolons style** (`semi: false` in Prettier config), lines that start with `[`, `(`, or `` ` `` get a leading `;` to prevent the parser from treating them as continuations of the previous line:

```ts
// Without leading ;, this could parse as: previousThing[(1, 2, 3)]
;[1, 2, 3].forEach(...)

// Without leading ;, this could parse as: previousThing(function(){...})
;(function() { ... })()

// Template literal used as expression
;`some string`.split(...)
```

However, this project has `semi: true` (default Prettier), so you shouldn't see leading semicolons. If Prettier is producing them, it likely means you have `semi: false` set somewhere. Check:

---

<sub>⏱️ 11302m 15s</sub>

### ✅ `bash`

$ cd /Users/lynbh/Development/companion-module-dev/companion-module-zoom-osc-iso && cat .prettierrc 2>/dev/null || cat prettier.config.js 2>/dev/null || cat prettier.config.mjs 2>/dev/null || grep -i prettier package.json | head -5 || echo "No Prettier config found"

<details>
<summary>10 lines</summary>

```
{
	"arrowParens": "always",
	"bracketSpacing": true,
	"printWidth": 120,
	"semi": false,
	"singleQuote": true,
	"useTabs": true,
	"endOfLine": "lf"
}
<exited with exit code 0>
```

</details>

---

<sub>⏱️ 11302m 20s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

There it is — `"semi": false`. So Prettier **will** add leading `;` to lines starting with `[`, `(`, or `` ` ``. The three cases you'll encounter in this codebase:

```ts
// Array literals at start of expression
;[1001, 1002, 1003].map(...)

// Grouped expressions / IIFEs
;(async () =\> { ... })()

// Template literals as statements
;`template`.trim()
```

In practice for test files, the most common one you'd hit is an array literal like `[1001, 1002, 1003]` used as a standalone expression. Prettier auto-adds the `;` — you don't write it manually, just let Prettier format on save.

---

6.

9. 	let actions: ReturnType<typeof GetActionsGallery>
10.

13. 		actions = GetActionsGallery(instance)
14. 	})
15.

17. 		instance.ZoomClientDataObj.galleryOrder = [1001, 1002, 1003]
18. 		instance.ZoomClientDataObj.selectedCallers = []
19. 	})

22. 		;(instance.OSC.sendCommand as jest.Mock).mockClear()
23. 	})
24.
25. 	describe('selectFromGalleryPosition', () => {
26. 		it('selects user at gallery position 1 with select option', () => {

28. 				{ options: { position: 1, option: 'select' } } as any,
29. 				{} as any,
30. 			)
31. 			expect(instance.ZoomClientDataObj.selectedCallers).toContain(1001)
32. 		})
33.

37. 				{} as any,

40. 		})
41.

44. 			;(actions[ActionIdGallery.selectFromGalleryPosition] as any).callback(
45. 				{ options: { position: 1, option: 'remove' } } as any,
46. 				{} as any,
47. 			)

49. 		})

53. 			instance.ZoomClientDataObj.selectedCallers = [1001]

55. 				{ options: { position: 1, option: 'toggle' } } as any,
56. 				{} as any,
57. 			)

68. 		})

86. })

import { describe, it, expect, jest, beforeAll, beforeEach, afterEach } from '@jest/globals'
import { createMockInstance } from '../helpers/mock-instance.js'
import { GetActionsSocalSteam, ActionIdSocialStream } from '../../src/actions/action-social-stream.js'
import { socialStreamApi } from '../../src/socialstream.js'
import type { InstanceBaseExt } from '../../src/utils.js'
import type { ZoomConfig } from '../../src/config.js'

// Mock got-cjs to prevent real HTTP calls from socialstream internals
jest.mock('got-cjs', () => ({
	default: { post: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({ body: 'ok' } as never) },
}))

describe('GetActionsSocalSteam', () => {
	let instance: InstanceBaseExt<ZoomConfig>
	let actions: ReturnType<typeof GetActionsSocalSteam>
	let postMessageSpy: ReturnType<typeof jest.spyOn>

	beforeAll(() => {
		instance = createMockInstance()
		actions = GetActionsSocalSteam(instance)
	})

	beforeEach(() => {
		;(instance as any).saveConfig = jest.fn()
		postMessageSpy = jest.spyOn(socialStreamApi, 'postMessage').mockResolvedValue(undefined as never)
		jest.clearAllMocks()
		// Re-spy after clearAllMocks since clearAllMocks resets mock state
		postMessageSpy = jest.spyOn(socialStreamApi, 'postMessage').mockResolvedValue(undefined as never)
	})

	afterEach(() => {
		;(instance.OSC.sendCommand as jest.Mock).mockClear()
	})

	// ── sendAChatToSocialStream ───────────────────────────────────────────────

	describe('sendAChatToSocialStream', () => {
		it('calls socialStreamApi.postMessage when enableSocialStream is true', async () => {
			instance.config.enableSocialStream = true
			await (actions[ActionIdSocialStream.sendAChatToSocialStream] as any).callback(
				{ options: { name: 'Alice', message: 'Hello' } } as any,
				{} as any,
			)
			expect(postMessageSpy).toHaveBeenCalledWith('Alice', 'Hello', instance)
		})

		it('logs a warning and skips postMessage when enableSocialStream is false', async () => {
			instance.config.enableSocialStream = false
			await (actions[ActionIdSocialStream.sendAChatToSocialStream] as any).callback(
				{ options: { name: 'Alice', message: 'Hello' } } as any,
				{} as any,
			)
			expect(postMessageSpy).not.toHaveBeenCalled()
			expect(instance.log).toHaveBeenCalledWith('warn', 'Social Stream is not enabled in config')
		})

		it('resolves variables in name and message before posting', async () => {
			instance.config.enableSocialStream = true
			// action resolves message first, then name
			;(instance.parseVariablesInString as jest.Mock)
				.mockResolvedValueOnce('Resolved Message' as never)
				.mockResolvedValueOnce('Resolved Name' as never)
			await (actions[ActionIdSocialStream.sendAChatToSocialStream] as any).callback(
				{ options: { name: '$(var:name)', message: '$(var:msg)' } } as any,
				{} as any,
			)
			expect(postMessageSpy).toHaveBeenCalledWith('Resolved Name', 'Resolved Message', instance)
		})
	})

The goal is to rewrite these so no line starts with `(`, eliminating the need for the leading `;`.\n\n**PATTERNS TO FIX:**\n\n1. `(instance.OSC.sendCommand as jest.Mock).mockClear()`\n   → `const sendCommand = instance.OSC.sendCommand as jest.Mock`\n   → `sendCommand.mockClear()`\n\n2. `(instance as any).saveConfig = jest.fn()`\n   → `const anyInstance = instance as any`\n   → `anyInstance.saveConfig = jest.fn()`\n   (if multiple `(instance as any).xxx` lines are in the same scope, reuse the same `anyInstance` variable — declare once, use multiple times)\n\n3. `(instance as any).updateInstance = jest.fn()`\n   → same pattern as #2, reuse `anyInstance` if already declared in scope\n\n4. `(instance as any).OSC = null`\n   → same pattern as #2, reuse `anyInstance` if already declared in scope\n\n5. `(actions[ActionId.someAction] as any).callback(args)`\n   → `const callback = (actions[ActionId.someAction] as any).callback`\n   → `callback(args)`\n   Each `it()` block has its own scope, so each gets its own `const callback`.\n\n6. `(instance.parseVariablesInString as jest.Mock)\\n  .mockResolvedValueOnce(...)\\n  .mockResolvedValueOnce(...)`\n   → `const parseVars = instance.parseVariablesInString as jest.Mock`\n   → `parseVars.mockResolvedValueOnce(...).mockResolvedValueOnce(...)`\n\n**IMPORTANT RULES:**\n- Remove the leading `;` when extracting to a variable\n- In `afterEach`/`beforeEach` callbacks, if `(instance.OSC.sendCommand as jest.Mock).mockClear()` is the only line, replace with the 2-line pattern\n- In `beforeEach`, if both `(instance as any).saveConfig = jest.fn()` and other `(instance as any).xxx` exist, declare `const anyInstance = instance as any` once at the top of that block\n- Do NOT change any logic — only restructure to avoid import { describe, it, expect, beforeAll, beforeEach } from '@jest/globals'
import { createMockInstance } from '../helpers/mock-instance.js'
import { GetActionsGlobalRecording, ActionIdGlobalRecording } from '../../src/actions/action-global-recording.js'

describe('GetActionsGlobalRecording', () => {
	let instance: ReturnType<typeof createMockInstance>
	let actions: ReturnType<typeof GetActionsGlobalRecording>

	beforeAll(() => {
		instance = createMockInstance()
		actions = GetActionsGlobalRecording(instance)
	})

	beforeEach(() => {
		const sendCommand = instance.OSC.sendCommand as jest.Mock
		sendCommand.mockClear()
	})

	const cases: [ActionIdGlobalRecording, string][] = [
		[ActionIdGlobalRecording.startLocalRecording, '/zoom/startLocalRecording'],
		[ActionIdGlobalRecording.pauseLocalRecording, '/zoom/pauseLocalRecording'],
		[ActionIdGlobalRecording.resumeLocalRecording, '/zoom/resumeLocalRecording'],
		[ActionIdGlobalRecording.stopLocalRecording, '/zoom/stopLocalRecording'],
		[ActionIdGlobalRecording.startCloudRecording, '/zoom/startCloudRecording'],
		[ActionIdGlobalRecording.pauseCloudRecording, '/zoom/pauseCloudRecording'],
		[ActionIdGlobalRecording.resumeCloudRecording, '/zoom/resumeCloudRecording'],
		[ActionIdGlobalRecording.stopCloudRecording, '/zoom/stopCloudRecording'],
	]

	it.each(cases)('%s sends %s with no args', async (actionId, expectedPath) => {
		await (actions[actionId] as any).callback({} as any, {} as any)
		expect(instance.OSC.sendCommand).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expectedPath, [])
	})
})
<exited with exit code 0>
